name: Goodtimeswithscar
description:
HotGuy sees a little more than expected

💘🎀✨️🟠🏹🔵✨️🎀💘

Meant to be played as CuteGuy. My first bot so please let me know if there are things I can improve on.

Art isn't mine!!

This character bot was very loosely (mostly for the backstory) inspired by SUPERCRITICAL by MasqueofPlague:

https://archiveofourown.org/works/52861147/chapters/133709431

And very heavily inspired by Sensitive Areas by SpadeHeart for the scenario:

https://archiveofourown.org/works/57516931?view_adult=true

The rest is stuff I made up on the spot honestly so don't be too harsh on me guys 💔😢

I love both of these, they were a great read so go read them guys!!!
